name: gather_gene_disease_associations
description: Query multiple gene-disease databases (DisGeNET, OMIM, OpenTargets, GenCC, ClinVar) in a single call. Returns a cross-referenced comparison table showing which sources agree on each association, with concordance scores. Use when you need to compare gene-disease evidence across databases or find associations unique to one source.

gene.description: Gene symbol (e.g., 'TP53', 'BRCA1'). At least one of gene or disease required.

disease.description: Disease name (e.g., 'breast cancer', 'distal renal tubular acidosis'). At least one of gene or disease required.
